mode_of_action_summary: Chlorantraniliprole acts by activating ryanodine receptors in insect muscles, causing uncontrolled calcium release, paralysis, and death. It is highly effective against chewing pests, especially caterpillars and borers, with long residual control.

active_ingredients.name: Chlorantraniliprole
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Ryanodine receptor modulator causing muscle paralysis

pest_behavior.leaf_feeding: Larvae feed on leaves reducing photosynthesis
pest_behavior.boring: Borers damage stems and fruits causing yield loss
pest_behavior.rapid_growth: Larvae grow quickly and cause severe crop damage

application_details.method: Uniform foliar spray ensuring coverage of leaves and growing points
application_details.coverage: Ensure thorough coverage for ingestion by larvae

resistance_management.advantage: Highly effective against resistant caterpillar populations

farmer_benefits: سنڈیاں فوراً کھانا چھوڑ دیندیاں نیں

multilingual_description.english: Systemic insecticide for effective control of caterpillars and borers.
multilingual_description.urdu: سنڈیوں اور بوررز کے مؤثر کنٹرول کے لیے دوا۔
multilingual_description.punjabi: سنڈیاں تے بورر کیڑیاں لئی مؤثر سپرے۔

embedding_text: Cora Plus 11.6 SC insecticide contains chlorantraniliprole and is used for control of caterpillars bollworms and borers in cotton rice and vegetables. It stops feeding quickly and provides long lasting control.
